changesSummary: Attempt 2: Added an info callout to the 'Clone a page' section (GAP-001 fix). Inserted {% info %}...{% endinfo %} block between the section heading and the description paragraph, matching the exact structural pattern of the existing 'Create a new page' permission note. Content states that cloning requires Read page permissions on the source page and Read + Create page permissions on the target parent page, sourced from docFact permissionSummary.clonePage (WebPagesApplication.cs:677-691). Uses 'you need' phrasing per INV-style-132, active voice per INV-style-001, and business-user-appropriate language per INV-persona-013. Cross-references the page-level permissions page via {% page_link permissions_pagelevel_xp %} with the same anchor and linkText as the existing callout. No other content was changed.
